channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16301] sanity-quota test_2: project create fail, but expect success
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for HUANG XING <hxing@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/108149eb-cd1b-4e2b-ae1b-ffc209d60686

From the log:

[12147.883416] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Create 1024 files ...
[12150.912568] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark Create out of file quota ...
[12151.318518] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Create out of file quota ...
[12152.307450] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=0
[12153.746948] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug="trace super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console quota lfsck"
[12155.908586] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=0
[12157.266059] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug="trace super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console quota lfsck"
[12169.442453] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark --------------------------------------
[12169.812207] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: --------------------------------------
[12170.285756] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark Group quota \(inode hardlimit:2048 files\)
[12170.710190] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Group quota (inode hardlimit:2048 files)
[12173.429093] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark Create 2048 files ...
[12173.820381] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Create 2048 files ...
[12177.279159] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=0
[12178.700542] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug="trace super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console quota lfsck"
[12180.798019] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=0
[12182.228187] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug="trace super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console quota lfsck"
[12195.626050] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark --------------------------------------
[12196.031184] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: --------------------------------------
[12196.484438] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark Project quota \(inode hardlimit:2048 files\)
[12196.865220] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Project quota (inode hardlimit:2048 files)
[12199.445492] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark Create 2048 files ...
[12199.826924] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Create 2048 files ...
[12202.905397] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark Files for project \(1000\):
[12203.288430] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Files for project (1000):
[12203.772121] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  sanity-quota test_2: @@@@@@ FAIL: project create fail, but expect success 
[12204.172087] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: sanity-quota test_2: @@@@@@ FAIL: project create fail, but expect success
[12204.615473] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-1/2022-11-07/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-4_90364_15_6a136296-0c38-4a7c-a359-2b9c700587b9//sanity-quota.test_2.debug_log.$(hostname -s).1667814498.log;
               		dmesg > /autotest/autotest-1/2022-11-07/lustre-reviews_r
item.summary: sanity-quota test_2: project create fail, but expect success

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
